title: Set up Lucia Auth v3 in Next.js
summary: Add session-based authentication with Lucia v3 to a Next.js app — email/password sign-up and sign-in, secure cookie sessions, protected routes, and Drizzle ORM adapter.
declaration: I will add session-based authentication to this Next.js project using Lucia v3 with email/password credentials. This covers user creation, session management with secure cookies, and route protection via middleware. Lucia works with any SQL database — I'll use Drizzle ORM. If you prefer Clerk or Auth.js, say so before I begin.
